relay.title: BLE relay
relay.description: Select the ESPHome node that scans for Sonoff BLE remotes.

setup.title: Add remote
setup.description: Configure the Sonoff remote you want to add.

pair.title: Pairing
pair.description:
Relay: {relay}. {captured}

Press any button on the {model}, then click Submit.

manual.title: Manual device ID
manual.description: Enter the hex device ID from ESPHome logs (e.g. 5acc35c8, no 0x prefix).

error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be 6-8 hex characters.
error.already_configured: This remote is already added on this BLE relay.
error.pair_timeout: No button press reached Home Assistant. Press a button on the R5, wait a second, then click Submit. Check Developer Tools > Events for esphome.sonoff_ble.
error.ha_actions_disabled: Enable 'Allow the device to perform Home Assistant actions' on your ESPHome BLE relay device, then try again.

init.title: Sonoff BLE Remote options
init.description: Ignore duplicate BLE events for the same button within this window. Increase if one press triggers twice; decrease for faster repeat presses on the same button.
